# Luna by PM Lab

> Luna is an AI perimenopause companion that connects the dots between your symptoms so you understand what your body is telling you.

Luna, created by PM Lab, lets you speak or type what you're feeling. It organizes entries into symptom trends, clinical-language summaries, and reports you can share with your practitioner. Luna is clinical decision support, not a diagnostic tool.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Luna and how pattern tracking works.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and pricing for Luna.
- [For Clinicians](/for-clinicians): How Luna supports perimenopause care in practice.
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers about PM Lab, Luna, tracking, insights, and privacy.
- [Legal](/legal): Privacy policy and terms.
